scripts.smoke:connector: npm --prefix connector run build && node scripts/smoke-connector.mjs
scripts.smoke:local-pairing: npm --prefix connector run build && node scripts/smoke-local-pairing.mjs
scripts.smoke:local-approval: npm --prefix connector run build && node scripts/smoke-local-approval.mjs
scripts.smoke:service-program: npm --prefix connector run build && node scripts/smoke-service-program.mjs
scripts.smoke:real-collectors: npm --prefix connector run build && node scripts/smoke-real-collectors.mjs
scripts.smoke:codexbar: npm --prefix connector run build && node scripts/smoke-codexbar.mjs
scripts.smoke:codexbar:fake: npm --prefix connector run build && node scripts/smoke-codexbar-fake-cli.mjs
scripts.check:connector-package: npm --prefix connector run build && node scripts/check-connector-package.mjs
scripts.start:mock: npm --prefix connector run build && node connector/dist/connector/src/cli.js start --mock fixtures/normal.json --port 8787
scripts.start:real: npm --prefix connector run build && node connector/dist/connector/src/cli.js start --port 8787
scripts.start:codexbar: npm --prefix connector run build && node connector/dist/connector/src/cli.js start --codexbar --port 8787
scripts.connector:status: npm --prefix connector run build && node connector/dist/connector/src/cli.js status
scripts.connector:status:live: npm --prefix connector run build && node connector/dist/connector/src/cli.js status --live
scripts.connector:doctor: npm --prefix connector run build && node connector/dist/connector/src/cli.js doctor
scripts.connector:doctor:live: npm --prefix connector run build && node connector/dist/connector/src/cli.js doctor --live
scripts.connector:snapshot: npm --prefix connector run build && node connector/dist/connector/src/cli.js snapshot
scripts.connector:approvals: npm --prefix connector run build && node connector/dist/connector/src/cli.js approvals
scripts.connector:approvals:seed: npm --prefix connector run build && node connector/dist/connector/src/cli.js approvals seed
scripts.connector:approvals:clear: npm --prefix connector run build && node connector/dist/connector/src/cli.js approvals clear
scripts.connector:service:plist: npm --prefix connector run build && node connector/dist/connector/src/cli.js service plist
scripts.connector:service:install: npm --prefix connector run build && node connector/dist/connector/src/cli.js service install
scripts.connector:service:install:claude-code-tt: npm --prefix connector run build && node connector/dist/connector/src/cli.js service install --claude-code-tty
scripts.connector:service:install:codexbar: npm --prefix connector run build && node connector/dist/connector/src/cli.js service install --codexbar
scripts.connector:service:status: npm --prefix connector run build && node connector/dist/connector/src/cli.js service status
scripts.connector:service:load: npm --prefix connector run build && node connector/dist/connector/src/cli.js service load
scripts.connector:service:unload: npm --prefix connector run build && node connector/dist/connector/src/cli.js service unload
scripts.connector:service:uninstall: npm --prefix connector run build && node connector/dist/connector/src/cli.js service uninstall
scripts.pair:manual: npm --prefix connector run build && node connector/dist/connector/src/cli.js pair --port 8787 --manual
scripts.pair:current:manual: npm --prefix connector run build && node connector/dist/connector/src/cli.js pair --port 8787 --current --manual
scripts.device:evidence: npm --prefix connector run build && node scripts/device-evidence.mjs
scripts.device:evidence:local: npm --prefix connector run build && node scripts/device-evidence.mjs --local-only
scripts.device:build:unsigned: xcodebuild -project ios/AIUsageWidget.xcodeproj -scheme AIUsageWidgetApp -sdk iphoneos -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS' -derivedDataPath build/DerivedData -destination-timeout 30 CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
scripts.build:ios:sim: xcodebuild -project ios/AIUsageWidget.xcodeproj -scheme AIUsageWidgetApp -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -derivedDataPath build/DerivedData CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
scripts.check:ios: mkdir -p .swift-module-cache && ruby -e 'require "yaml"; YAML.load_file("ios/project.yml")' && plutil -lint ios/AIUsageWidgetApp/Info.plist ios/AIUsageWidgetExtension/Info.plist ios/AIUsageWidgetApp/AIUsageWidgetApp.entitlements ios/AIUsageWidgetExtension/AIUsageWidgetExtension.entitlements && xcrun --sdk iphoneos swiftc -target arm64-apple-ios17.0 -module-cache-path .swift-module-cache -parse ios/Shared/*.swift ios/AIUsageWidgetApp/*.swift && xcrun --sdk iphoneos swiftc -target arm64-apple-ios17.0 -module-cache-path .swift-module-cache -parse ios/Shared/*.swift ios/AIUsageWidgetExtension/*.swift && node scripts/check-ios-pairing-validator.mjs && swiftc -module-cache-path .swift-module-cache ios/Shared/*.swift ios/Tools/ValidateFixtures.swift -o /tmp/aiuw-validate-fixtures && /tmp/aiuw-validate-fixtures
scripts.check:scripts: node --check scripts/lib/ios-build-freshness.mjs && node --check scripts/lib/appintent-metadata.mjs && node --check scripts/lib/device-discovery.mjs && node --check scripts/lib/device-evidence-policy.mjs && node --check scripts/build-ios-tests.mjs && node --check scripts/check-appintent-metadata.mjs && node --check scripts/check-appintent-metadata-fresh.mjs && node --check scripts/check-ios-test-build-fresh.mjs && node --check scripts/check-ios-config.mjs && node --check scripts/check-ios-pairing-validator.mjs && node --check scripts/check-source-hygiene.mjs && node --check scripts/check-device-discovery.mjs && node --check scripts/check-device-preflight-policy.mjs && node --check scripts/check-device-next-policy.mjs && node --check scripts/check-device-evidence-policy.mjs && node --check scripts/check-device-evidence-docs.mjs && node --check scripts/check-connector-package.mjs && node --check scripts/setup-local.mjs && node --check scripts/device-preflight.mjs && node --check scripts/device-next.mjs && node --check scripts/signing-diagnose.mjs && node --check scripts/signing-apply-team.mjs && node --check scripts/device-evidence.mjs && node --check scripts/device-runbook.mjs && node --check scripts/device-install.mjs && node --check scripts/check-product-invariants.mjs && node --check scripts/render-widget-previews.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-connector.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-local-pairing.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-local-approval.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-service-program.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-real-collectors.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-codexbar.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-codexbar-fake-cli.mjs && node scripts/check-source-hygiene.mjs && node scripts/check-device-discovery.mjs && node scripts/check-device-preflight-policy.mjs && node scripts/check-device-next-policy.mjs && node scripts/check-device-evidence-policy.mjs && node scripts/check-ios-test-build-fresh.mjs && node scripts/check-device-evidence-docs.mjs
scripts.check: npm test && npm run test:connector && npm run check:connector-package && npm run check:product && npm run check:appintents:fresh && npm run check:ios && npm run check:ios-config && npm run render:widget-previews && npm run check:scripts && npm run smoke:local-pairing && npm run smoke:local-approval && npm run smoke:service-program && npm run smoke:codexbar:fake && npm run device:preflight:local && npm run device:evidence:local
